title: helictotrichon pratense f. hirsutum
intro: Helictotrichon pratense f. hirsutum, also known as hairy meadow oat grass, is a type of ornamental grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Helictotrichon pratense f. hirsutum typically involve drying the leaves and roots, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea or tincture.
